gaps.title: No Executive Simulation Layer
gaps.description: Y-OS cannot model causal impact of decisions. What-if analysis is impossible.
gaps.remediation: Implement MISSION-026 Executive Simulation Layer

gaps.title: No Semantic Search over Corpus
gaps.description: 4,056 semantic edges exist but are not queryable via natural language.
gaps.remediation: Implement vector index + semantic search API

gaps.title: No External Trigger for Event Bus
gaps.description: Event Bus operational but requires manual trigger. No n8n/webhook integration.
gaps.remediation: Implement n8n webhook → Event Bus bridge

gaps.title: Orphan Rate 7.1% (34 files)
gaps.description: 34 Markdown files remain unlinked despite KGC v4. Body wikilinks pass incomplete.
gaps.remediation: KGC v5 body wikilinks pass targeting orphan files

gaps.title: Python __pycache__ committed to Git
gaps.description: Runtime __pycache__ directories are committed to y-os-doctrine. Adds noise.
gaps.remediation: Add .gitignore for __pycache__ and remove committed .pyc files

gaps.title: No Git auto-push hook
gaps.description: Every mission requires manual git commit + push. 82 manual operations.
gaps.remediation: Implement Event Bus → git push hook

gaps.title: Mission lineage 9 LOW-confidence edges
gaps.description: 9 of 20 lineage edges are LOW confidence (human_review_required=true).
gaps.remediation: Human review + confirmation of 9 LOW-confidence edges

gaps.title: Gemini not live-tested
gaps.description: Gemini registered in provider registry but no live API key validated.
gaps.remediation: Add GEMINI_API_KEY to Manus Secrets, run live validation

gaps.title: No cost budget enforcement
gaps.description: Cost tracking exists but no hard budget limits. Runaway cost possible.
gaps.remediation: Implement budget_enforcer_v1 with configurable limits

gaps.title: No Constitutional Amendment Protocol
gaps.description: Constitution v1 FROZEN but no formal amendment process defined.
gaps.remediation: Define amendment protocol in new ADR

gaps.title: Lakshmi review is code-only, not LLM-based
gaps.description: Lakshmi governance is rule-based scoring, not semantic reasoning.
gaps.remediation: Implement LLM-based Lakshmi review using Anthropic API

gaps.title: ADR supersession chain not traversable
gaps.description: ADRs that supersede others lack machine-readable supersedes edges.
gaps.remediation: Add supersedes edges in KGC v5

gaps.title: No concept-to-concept edges
gaps.description: 12→39 concept nodes exist but have no inter-concept edges.
gaps.remediation: Add concept-to-concept typed edges in KGC v5

gaps.title: Pipeline orchestrator has no retry logic
gaps.description: Failed worker calls have no automatic retry. Failover is provider-level only.
gaps.remediation: Add retry_policy to pipeline_orchestrator_v2

gaps.title: No parallel worker execution
gaps.description: Pipeline executes workers sequentially. Parallel execution would reduce latency.
gaps.remediation: Implement parallel worker lanes in pipeline_orchestrator_v2

gaps.title: No real-time alerting to external channel
gaps.description: Alert engine generates alerts but does not push to Slack/email/webhook.
gaps.remediation: Implement alert_publisher_v1 with n8n/webhook output

gaps.title: Dashboards not accessible outside Obsidian
gaps.description: All dashboards are Dataview-dependent. No static HTML export.
gaps.remediation: Implement dashboard_exporter_v1 generating static HTML

gaps.title: No Notion sync for ODT Registry
gaps.description: ODT Registry is JSON-only. Not accessible cross-session without file read.
gaps.remediation: Implement notion_odt_sync_v1

gaps.title: No cross-session memory for strategic decisions
gaps.description: Strategic recommendations generated per-session. No persistent memory.
gaps.remediation: Implement Mem0 sync for strategic decisions

gaps.title: y-os-doctrine not archived to Notion Memory
gaps.description: 82 commits represent significant knowledge not yet in Notion Memory.
gaps.remediation: Run session-synthesizer + memoriser skills on y-os-doctrine
